description: This file defines the MailjetEmailProvider class which implements an email sending service using the Mailjet API (version 3.1). It constructs and sends HTTP POST requests with email payloads to Mailjet's API endpoint, handling API credentials and configuration. The class provides a method to send emails given recipient address, subject, and body text.

classes.name: MailjetEmailProvider
classes.description: Implements email sending via Mailjet API, utilizing provided configuration properties and HTTP client to send emails.

methods.name: MailjetEmailProvider
methods.description: Constructor initializes the provider with configuration properties and object mapper, setting up the HTTP client.

methods.name: send
methods.description: Sends an email message using Mailjet API, constructing the payload, setting headers, handling credentials, and processing the response.
